title: Update package.json scripts to remove dead references
description: Remove scripts that point to deleted files: stdio, mcp:stdio (both use bin/stdio-server.js), build:http-simple (http-simple.ts deleted). Update clean script to include dist-ts/ and bin/*.js. Fix mcp:build (duplicate of build:all). Update npm → bun in build:all chain (M12).
validation: Read package.json scripts. Confirm dead scripts removed, clean script updated, build:all uses bun run.
